description: Group + aggregate inside the warehouse (CTAS pushdown). No data into Python.

inputs.description: Source table in the warehouse (named by upstream_table)

outputs.description: CTAS-produced table in the same warehouse

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Output Dagster asset name (the table this asset produces)

database_url.label: Database URL (literal)
database_url.description: SQLAlchemy URL for the warehouse. Set this OR database_url_env_var.

database_url_env_var.label: Database URL Env Var
database_url_env_var.description: Env var with the warehouse SQLAlchemy URL. Set this OR database_url.

dialect.label: SQL Dialect
dialect.description: duckdb / postgres / snowflake / bigquery / redshift / databricks / mssql / mysql

aggregations.label: Aggregations
aggregations.description: {out_col: agg_func} or {out_col: {col: <src>, agg: <func>}}. Supported aggs: sum, mean/avg, min, max, count, nunique.

deps.label: Dependencies
deps.description: Upstream Dagster asset keys (lineage only — no data passed at runtime)

include_preview_metadata.label: Include Preview Metadata
include_preview_metadata.description: Emit a SELECT … LIMIT N preview as asset metadata after CTAS

preview_rows.label: Preview Rows
preview_rows.description: Rows to include in the preview when include_preview_metadata is true
